title: justicia tuxtlensis
intro: Justicia tuxtlensis, also known as the Tuxtlas Justicia, is a flowering plant species native to Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Justicia tuxtlensis include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions such as wounds and cuts. Herbal preparations of this plant are often used in tea or tincture form to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
